text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Do you know anything about<n>the
number 6000*6?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You see, when I texted Maruzen about<n>the next
race, all I got back from her was<n>that number...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's got to be something to do with the<n>race. But...
it's not a time, or a distance...<n>Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I won't give up, though! It's preciousadvice from a friend, so I will figure itout!
